examples: The aftermath of the war was a huge shock for the people in that country.
The equipment in American studios was more advanced than anything in Britain, which had led the Beatles' great rivals, the Rolling Stones, to make their latest album, "Aftermath", in Los Angeles.
A lot of rebuilding took place in the aftermath of the war.
In the Middle East, Chance reported extensively from Iraq in the aftermath of the 2003 war.
Al Santoli is the author of two histories of the Vietnam War and its aftermath.
